meta.title: Lewis Libby on U.S. Foreign Policy in Afghanistan and Iran for Fox News
meta.description: Hudson Senior Vice President Lewis Libby appeared on the O'Reilly Factor on September 7, 2010 to discuss U.S. foreign policy in Afghanistan and Iran.
